script: echo === bot status ===; systemctl is-active mskai-bot.service mskai-responder.service claude-bot.service claude-responder.service 2>/dev/null; echo; echo === migration log ===; sudo tail -30 /var/log/mskai-to-claude-migration.log 2>/dev/null || echo no migration log; echo; echo === which home is live ===; sudo ls -la /home/mskai/.mskai-bot/ /home/claude/.claude-bot/ 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo; echo === latest debug-log mtime ===; sudo find /home -path '*-bot/responder-debug.log' -printf '%T@ %p\n' 2>/dev/null | sort -n | tail -3
